title: allium drummondii
intro: Allium drummondii, also known as Drummond's onion or wild onion, is a perennial plant species in the Allium genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Allium drummondii can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and wounds.
